title: FATHIYA Professional Usage Patterns
source_files: دليل احترافي لاستخدام تطبيق ChatGPT — كيف تصبح محترفًا 2.docx
دليل احترافي لاستخدام تطبيق ChatGPT — كيف تصبح محترفًا.docx
summary: Professional usage patterns for AI-assisted work, covering five primary modes: researcher, analyst, entrepreneur, programmer, and decision-pressure.
key_principles: Researcher mode: deep synthesis, source triangulation, and evidence mapping.
Analyst mode: data-driven evaluation, comparison frameworks, and structured assessment.
Entrepreneur mode: opportunity identification, rapid prototyping, and market validation.
Programmer mode: code generation, architecture review, debugging, and system design.
Decision-pressure mode: time-constrained analysis, option ranking, and trade-off surfacing.
boundary: Usage pattern documentation only. Does not activate specific modes or change system behavior.
